subject: [COMMON] Add support for Gateway-API in Ingress template
commit_message:
[COMMON] Add support for Gateway-API in Ingress template

Add options to set the Ingress provider and enhanced
settings to provide different resource outputs for
Ingress resurces

Issue-ID: OOM-3184

Change-Id: I3a6ebf17191a558941d6e18fbfe676da0c78e487
Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
